examples: With cruises from April to October, you have lots of opportunities to sail, swim, sightsee, and shop in lots of wonderful places.
I came on business before, but this time I'm here to sightsee.
The Tian Tan Buddha, or Big Buddha as it is often called, on Lantau Island is a must-sightsee.
It doesn't include street level information on how to sightsee on foot and ignores major cities like Paris and Miami.
